description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI build that runs on push, pull request, and release creation events. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on multiple platforms including Windows (with MSVC and MinGW), Ubuntu (22.04 and 24.04), and Mac OS (Latest x86_64 and arm64). For each job, check out the repository, fetch more history, and then build the project using CMake with the correct generator and architecture.
